Bash("D:\\PhD\\skills-extraction\\analyze_log.py" << 'PYEOF'
import re
from collections import defaultdict
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

LOG_FILE = r'D:\\PhD\\skills-extraction\\full_run_output\\SkillsExtraction_pipeline_run_full_10k_20260327_185602.log'

pattern = r'\(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2} \\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2}\),\\d+ - DEBUG - .* - LLM \(\\S+\) \\[\(\\w+\)\\] \([\\d.]+\)s \\| prompt=\(\\d+\) chars, resp=\(\\d+\) chars, eval_tokens=\(\\d+\), \([\\d.]+\) tok/s \\| total_duration=\([\\d.]+\)s'

records = []

with open\(LOG_FILE, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\) as f:
    for line in f:
        m = re.search\(pattern, line\)
        if m:
            dt = datetime.strptime\(m.group\(1\), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'\)
            records.append\({
                'datetime': dt,
                'model': m.group\(2\),
                'role': m.group\(3\),
                'wall_time': float\(m.group\(4\)\),
                'prompt_chars': int\(m.group\(5\)\),
                'resp_chars': int\(m.group\(6\)\),
                'eval_tokens': int\(m.group\(7\)\),
                'tok_s': float\(m.group\(8\)\),
                'total_duration': float\(m.group\(9\)\),
            }\)

print\(f"Parsed {len\(records\)} LLM call records from log file.\\n"\)

if not records:
    print\("No records found!"\)
    exit\(\)

# ============================================================
# 1. OVERALL STATS
# ============================================================
total_calls = len\(records\)
total_wall = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in records\)
total_eval_tokens = sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in records\)
total_prompt_chars = sum\(r['prompt_chars'] for r in records\)
total_resp_chars = sum\(r['resp_chars'] for r in records\)
avg_tok_s = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in records\) / total_calls
first_dt = records[0]['datetime']
last_dt = records[-1]['datetime']
elapsed = \(last_dt - first_dt\).total_seconds\(\)

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("  OVERALL STATS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\(f"  Total LLM calls:       {total_calls:>10,}"\)
print\(f"  Total wall time:       {total_wall:>10,.1f} s  \({total_wall/3600:.1f} hours\)"\)
print\(f"  Total eval tokens:     {total_eval_tokens:>10,}"\)
print\(f"  Total prompt chars:    {total_prompt_chars:>10,}"\)
print\(f"  Total resp chars:      {total_resp_chars:>10,}"\)
print\(f"  Avg tok/s:             {avg_tok_s:>10.1f}"\)
print\(f"  Time span:             {first_dt} -> {last_dt}"\)
print\(f"  Elapsed:               {elapsed/3600:.1f} hours"\)
if elapsed > 0:
    print\(f"  Avg calls/hour:        {total_calls / \(elapsed/3600\):.1f}"\)
print\(\)

# ============================================================
# 2. PHASE DETECTION & BREAKDOWN
# ============================================================
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("  PHASE ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

# Compute per-record resp/eval ratio
for r in records:
    r['resp_eval_ratio'] = r['resp_chars'] / max\(r['eval_tokens'], 1\)

# Hourly summary
hourly_windows = defaultdict\(list\)
for r in records:
    key = r['datetime'].replace\(minute=0, second=0\)
    hourly_windows[key].append\(r\)

print\(f"\\n  Hourly summary \(to identify phases\):\\n"\)
print\(f"  {'Hour':<22s} {'Calls':>6s} {'Avg tok/s':>10s} {'Avg wall':>9s} {'Avg resp/eval':>14s} {'Avg eval_tok':>12s}"\)
print\(f"  {'-'*22} {'-'*6} {'-'*10} {'-'*9} {'-'*14} {'-'*12}"\)

sorted_hours = sorted\(hourly_windows.keys\(\)\)
for hour in sorted_hours:
    recs = hourly_windows[hour]
    n = len\(recs\)
    avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_wt = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_ratio = sum\(r['resp_eval_ratio'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_et = sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in recs\) / n
    print\(f"  {hour.strftime\('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'\):>22s} {n:>6d} {avg_ts:>10.1f} {avg_wt:>9.1f}s {avg_ratio:>14.2f} {avg_et:>12.0f}"\)

# Group by date
dates_seen = sorted\(set\(r['datetime'].date\(\) for r in records\)\)
print\(f"\\n  Dates in log: {', '.join\(str\(d\) for d in dates_seen\)}"\)

by_date = defaultdict\(list\)
for r in records:
    by_date[r['datetime'].date\(\)].append\(r\)

print\(f"\\n  {'Date':<14s} {'Calls':>7s} {'Avg tok/s':>10s} {'Avg wall':>9s} {'Avg ratio':>10s} {'Avg eval':>9s}"\)
print\(f"  {'-'*14} {'-'*7} {'-'*10} {'-'*9} {'-'*10} {'-'*9}"\)
for d in sorted\(by_date.keys\(\)\):
    recs = by_date[d]
    n = len\(recs\)
    avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_wt = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_ratio = sum\(r['resp_eval_ratio'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_et = sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in recs\) / n
    print\(f"  {str\(d\):<14s} {n:>7d} {avg_ts:>10.1f} {avg_wt:>9.1f}s {avg_ratio:>10.2f} {avg_et:>9.0f}"\)

# Auto-detect phases via rolling window transitions
window_size = 50
transitions = []
for i in range\(window_size, len\(records\) - window_size\):
    before_avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in records[i-window_size:i]\) / window_size
    after_avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in records[i:i+window_size]\) / window_size
    if after_avg_ts - before_avg_ts > 15 and before_avg_ts < 100:
        transitions.append\(\(i, records[i]['datetime'], before_avg_ts, after_avg_ts\)\)

if transitions:
    deduped = [transitions[0]]
    for t in transitions[1:]:
        if t[0] - deduped[-1][0] > 100:
            deduped.append\(t\)
    transitions = deduped
    print\(f"\\n  Detected {len\(transitions\)} tok/s-based phase transition\(s\):"\)
    for idx, \(pos, dt, before, after\) in enumerate\(transitions\):
        print\(f"    Transition {idx+1} at record #{pos} \({dt}\): avg tok/s {before:.1f} -> {after:.1f}"\)

# Ratio-based transitions
ratio_transitions = []
for i in range\(window_size, len\(records\) - window_size\):
    before_avg_r = sum\(r['resp_eval_ratio'] for r in records[i-window_size:i]\) / window_size
    after_avg_r = sum\(r['resp_eval_ratio'] for r in records[i:i+window_size]\) / window_size
    if before_avg_r - after_avg_r > 2.0 and before_avg_r > 5:
        ratio_transitions.append\(\(i, records[i]['datetime'], before_avg_r, after_avg_r\)\)

if ratio_transitions:
    deduped_r = [ratio_transitions[0]]
    for t in ratio_transitions[1:]:
        if t[0] - deduped_r[-1][0] > 100:
            deduped_r.append\(t\)
    ratio_transitions = deduped_r
    print\(f"\\n  Ratio-based transitions \(resp_chars/eval_tokens drop\):"\)
    for idx, \(pos, dt, before, after\) in enumerate\(ratio_transitions\):
        print\(f"    Transition {idx+1} at record #{pos} \({dt}\): ratio {before:.2f} -> {after:.2f}"\)

# Merge and deduplicate transitions
all_transitions_sorted = sorted\(
    [\(t[0], t[1]\) for t in transitions] + [\(t[0], t[1]\) for t in ratio_transitions],
    key=lambda x: x[0]
\)
if all_transitions_sorted:
    final_transitions = [all_transitions_sorted[0]]
    for t in all_transitions_sorted[1:]:
        if t[0] - final_transitions[-1][0] > 200:
            final_transitions.append\(t\)
else:
    final_transitions = []

print\(f"\\n  Using {len\(final_transitions\)} transition point\(s\) to define phases."\)

phase_records = {1: [], 2: [], 3: []}
if len\(final_transitions\) == 0:
    phase_records[1] = records
elif len\(final_transitions\) == 1:
    cutoff = final_transitions[0][0]
    phase_records[1] = records[:cutoff]
    phase_records[3] = records[cutoff:]
else:
    cutoff1 = final_transitions[0][0]
    cutoff2 = final_transitions[1][0]
    phase_records[1] = records[:cutoff1]
    phase_records[2] = records[cutoff1:cutoff2]
    phase_records[3] = records[cutoff2:]

phase_labels = {
    1: "Phase 1 \(thinking active\)",
    2: "Phase 2 \(prompt /no_think\)",
    3: "Phase 3 \(API think:false\)",
}

print\(\)
print\(f"  {'Phase':<32s} {'Calls':>7s} {'Wall\(h\)':>8s} {'Eval tok':>10s} {'Avg tok/s':>10s} {'Avg wall':>9s} {'Avg ratio':>10s}"\)
print\(f"  {'-'*32} {'-'*7} {'-'*8} {'-'*10} {'-'*10} {'-'*9} {'-'*10}"\)

for phase_id in [1, 2, 3]:
    recs = phase_records[phase_id]
    if not recs:
        continue
    n = len\(recs\)
    tw = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\)
    te = sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in recs\)
    avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_wt = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_ratio = sum\(r['resp_eval_ratio'] for r in recs\) / n
    label = phase_labels.get\(phase_id, f"Phase {phase_id}"\)
    print\(f"  {label:<32s} {n:>7,d} {tw/3600:>8.1f} {te:>10,} {avg_ts:>10.1f} {avg_wt:>9.1f}s {avg_ratio:>10.2f}"\)
    print\(f"    Time range: {recs[0]['datetime']} -> {recs[-1]['datetime']}"\)

print\(\)

# ============================================================
# 3. BY ROLE
# ============================================================
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("  BY ROLE"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

by_role = defaultdict\(list\)
for r in records:
    by_role[r['role']].append\(r\)

print\(f"\\n  {'Role':<16s} {'Count':>8s} {'Avg wall':>9s} {'Avg eval':>9s} {'Avg tok/s':>10s} {'Avg prompt':>11s} {'Avg resp':>9s} {'Tot wall\(h\)':>12s}"\)
print\(f"  {'-'*16} {'-'*8} {'-'*9} {'-'*9} {'-'*10} {'-'*11} {'-'*9} {'-'*12}"\)

for role in sorted\(by_role.keys\(\)\):
    recs = by_role[role]
    n = len\(recs\)
    avg_wt = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_et = sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_pc = sum\(r['prompt_chars'] for r in recs\) / n
    avg_rc = sum\(r['resp_chars'] for r in recs\) / n
    tot_wt = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\)
    print\(f"  {role:<16s} {n:>8,d} {avg_wt:>9.1f}s {avg_et:>9.0f} {avg_ts:>10.1f} {avg_pc:>11.0f} {avg_rc:>9.0f} {tot_wt/3600:>12.1f}"\)

print\(\)

# ============================================================
# 4. HOURLY THROUGHPUT \(last 24 hours\)
# ============================================================
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("  HOURLY THROUGHPUT \(last 24 hours\)"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

cutoff_24h = last_dt - timedelta\(hours=24\)
recent_records = [r for r in records if r['datetime'] >= cutoff_24h]

if recent_records:
    hourly_recent = defaultdict\(list\)
    for r in recent_records:
        key = r['datetime'].replace\(minute=0, second=0\)
        hourly_recent[key].append\(r\)
    
    print\(f"\\n  {'Hour':<22s} {'Calls':>7s} {'Avg tok/s':>10s} {'Avg wall':>9s} {'Eval tokens':>12s}"\)
    print\(f"  {'-'*22} {'-'*7} {'-'*10} {'-'*9} {'-'*12}"\)
    
    for hour in sorted\(hourly_recent.keys\(\)\):
        recs = hourly_recent[hour]
        n = len\(recs\)
        avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in recs\) / n
        avg_wt = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\) / n
        tot_et = sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in recs\)
        print\(f"  {hour.strftime\('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'\):>22s} {n:>7d} {avg_ts:>10.1f} {avg_wt:>9.1f}s {tot_et:>12,}"\)
    
    total_recent = len\(recent_records\)
    hours_span = \(recent_records[-1]['datetime'] - recent_records[0]['datetime']\).total_seconds\(\) / 3600
    if hours_span > 0:
        print\(f"\\n  Effective throughput: {total_recent / hours_span:.1f} calls/hour over {hours_span:.1f} hours"\)
else:
    print\("  No records in last 24 hours."\)

print\(\)

# ============================================================
# 5. CURRENT STATS \(last 100 calls\)
# ============================================================
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("  CURRENT STATS \(last 100 calls\)"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

last100 = records[-100:]
n = len\(last100\)
avg_wt = sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in last100\) / n
avg_et = sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in last100\) / n
avg_ts = sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in last100\) / n
min_wt = min\(r['wall_time'] for r in last100\)
max_wt = max\(r['wall_time'] for r in last100\)
min_ts = min\(r['tok_s'] for r in last100\)
max_ts = max\(r['tok_s'] for r in last100\)
avg_pc = sum\(r['prompt_chars'] for r in last100\) / n
avg_rc = sum\(r['resp_chars'] for r in last100\) / n

print\(f"\\n  Time range:          {last100[0]['datetime']} -> {last100[-1]['datetime']}"\)
print\(f"  Avg wall time:       {avg_wt:>8.1f}s"\)
print\(f"  Min wall time:       {min_wt:>8.1f}s"\)
print\(f"  Max wall time:       {max_wt:>8.1f}s"\)
print\(f"  Avg eval tokens:     {avg_et:>8.0f}"\)
print\(f"  Avg tok/s:           {avg_ts:>8.1f}"\)
print\(f"  Min tok/s:           {min_ts:>8.1f}"\)
print\(f"  Max tok/s:           {max_ts:>8.1f}"\)
print\(f"  Avg prompt chars:    {avg_pc:>8.0f}"\)
print\(f"  Avg resp chars:      {avg_rc:>8.0f}"\)

print\(f"\\n  By role \(last 100\):"\)
by_role_100 = defaultdict\(list\)
for r in last100:
    by_role_100[r['role']].append\(r\)

print\(f"  {'Role':<16s} {'Count':>6s} {'Avg wall':>9s} {'Avg tok/s':>10s} {'Avg eval':>9s}"\)
print\(f"  {'-'*16} {'-'*6} {'-'*9} {'-'*10} {'-'*9}"\)
for role in sorted\(by_role_100.keys\(\)\):
    recs = by_role_100[role]
    rn = len\(recs\)
    print\(f"  {role:<16s} {rn:>6d} {sum\(r['wall_time'] for r in recs\)/rn:>9.1f}s {sum\(r['tok_s'] for r in recs\)/rn:>10.1f} {sum\(r['eval_tokens'] for r in recs\)/rn:>9.0f}"\)

print\(\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("  ANALYSIS COMPLETE"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
PYEOF)

Bash("D:\\PhD\\skills-extraction\\analyze_stage1.py" << 'PYEOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Analyze stage 1 checkpoint, log timing, and stage 2 checkpoint."""

import json
import re
import sys
from collections import Counter, defaultdict
from datetime import datetime
from statistics import median, mean

# ============================================================
# 1. Stage 1 Extraction Analysis \(line-by-line for memory\)
# ============================================================

STAGE1 = r"D:\\PhD\\skills-extraction\\full_run_output\\checkpoints\\full_10k_20260327_185602_stage1_extracted.jsonl"
LOGFILE = r"D:\\PhD\\skills-extraction\\full_run_output\\SkillsExtraction_pipeline_run_full_10k_20260327_185602.log"
STAGE2 = r"D:\\PhD\\skills-extraction\\full_run_output\\checkpoints\\full_10k_20260327_185602_stage2_verified.jsonl"

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("STAGE 1 EXTRACTION ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\(f"\\nReading: {STAGE1}"\)
print\("\(line-by-line to avoid memory issues with 356MB file\)\\n"\)

total_jobs = 0
total_mentions = 0
mentions_per_job = []
skill_counter = Counter\(\)
all_confidences = []
header = None
footer = None

with open\(STAGE1, "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    for line_num, line in enumerate\(f, 1\):
        line = line.strip\(\)
        if not line:
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line\)
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            print\(f"  [WARN] Could not parse line {line_num}"\)
            continue

        # Detect header/footer by checking for job_index
        if "job_index" not in rec:
            if line_num <= 2:
                header = rec
            else:
                footer = rec
            continue

        # It's a job record
        total_jobs += 1
        raw_mentions = rec.get\("raw_mentions", []\)
        n = len\(raw_mentions\)
        total_mentions += n
        mentions_per_job.append\(n\)

        for m in raw_mentions:
            nc = m.get\("normalized_candidate", ""\).strip\(\)
            if nc:
                skill_counter[nc.lower\(\)] += 1
            conf = m.get\("span_confidence"\)
            if conf is not None:
                try:
                    all_confidences.append\(float\(conf\)\)
                except \(ValueError, TypeError\):
                    pass

        if total_jobs % 2000 == 0:
            print\(f"  ... processed {total_jobs} jobs so far \({total_mentions} mentions\)"\)

print\(f"  Done. Processed {total_jobs} jobs, {total_mentions} mentions.\\n"\)

# ---- Table 1: Stage 1 Extraction Summary ----
print\("-" * 60\)
print\("TABLE 1: Stage 1 Extraction Summary"\)
print\("-" * 60\)
avg_mentions = total_mentions / total_jobs if total_jobs else 0
med_mentions = median\(mentions_per_job\) if mentions_per_job else 0
min_mentions = min\(mentions_per_job\) if mentions_per_job else 0
max_mentions = max\(mentions_per_job\) if mentions_per_job else 0
zero_mention_jobs = sum\(1 for x in mentions_per_job if x == 0\)
unique_skills = len\(skill_counter\)

rows = [
    \("Total jobs processed", f"{total_jobs:,}"\),
    \("Total mentions extracted", f"{total_mentions:,}"\),
    \("Avg mentions per job", f"{avg_mentions:.2f}"\),
    \("Median mentions per job", f"{med_mentions:.1f}"\),
    \("Min mentions per job", f"{min_mentions}"\),
    \("Max mentions per job", f"{max_mentions}"\),
    \("Jobs with 0 mentions", f"{zero_mention_jobs:,}"\),
    \("Unique normalized_candidate values", f"{unique_skills:,}"\),
]
for label, val in rows:
    print\(f"  {label:<40s} {val:>12s}"\)
print\(\)

if header:
    print\(f"  Header: {json.dumps\(header, default=str\)[:200]}"\)
if footer:
    print\(f"  Footer: {json.dumps\(footer, default=str\)[:200]}"\)
print\(\)

# ---- Table 2: Top 30 Most Common Skills ----
print\("-" * 60\)
print\("TABLE 2: Top 30 Most Common Skills \(by normalized_candidate\)"\)
print\("-" * 60\)
print\(f"  {'#':<4s} {'Skill':<50s} {'Count':>8s} {'%':>7s}"\)
print\(f"  {'---':<4s} {'--------------------------------------------------':<50s} {'--------':>8s} {'-------':>7s}"\)
for rank, \(skill, count\) in enumerate\(skill_counter.most_common\(30\), 1\):
    pct = 100.0 * count / total_mentions if total_mentions else 0
    print\(f"  {rank:<4d} {skill:<50s} {count:>8,d} {pct:>6.2f}%"\)
print\(\)

# ---- Table 3: Mention Distribution ----
print\("-" * 60\)
print\("TABLE 3: Mention Distribution \(mentions per job\)"\)
print\("-" * 60\)
buckets = [
    \("0", lambda x: x == 0\),
    \("1-10", lambda x: 1 <= x <= 10\),
    \("11-20", lambda x: 11 <= x <= 20\),
    \("21-30", lambda x: 21 <= x <= 30\),
    \("31-50", lambda x: 31 <= x <= 50\),
    \("51-100", lambda x: 51 <= x <= 100\),
    \("100+", lambda x: x > 100\),
]
print\(f"  {'Bucket':<12s} {'Jobs':>8s} {'%':>7s}  Bar"\)
print\(f"  {'------------':<12s} {'--------':>8s} {'-------':>7s}  {'----------------------------------------'}"\)
for label, pred in buckets:
    count = sum\(1 for x in mentions_per_job if pred\(x\)\)
    pct = 100.0 * count / total_jobs if total_jobs else 0
    bar = "#" * int\(pct / 2\)
    print\(f"  {label:<12s} {count:>8,d} {pct:>6.2f}%  {bar}"\)
print\(\)

# ---- Table 4: Confidence Distribution ----
print\("-" * 60\)
print\("TABLE 4: Confidence Distribution \(span_confidence\)"\)
print\("-" * 60\)
if all_confidences:
    avg_conf = mean\(all_confidences\)
    med_conf = median\(all_confidences\)
    min_conf = min\(all_confidences\)
    max_conf = max\(all_confidences\)
    print\(f"  {'Total mentions with confidence':<40s} {len\(all_confidences\):>12,d}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Average confidence':<40s} {avg_conf:>12.4f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Median confidence':<40s} {med_conf:>12.4f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Min confidence':<40s} {min_conf:>12.4f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Max confidence':<40s} {max_conf:>12.4f}"\)
    print\(\)

    # Histogram in 0.1-wide buckets
    conf_buckets = defaultdict\(int\)
    for c in all_confidences:
        if c >= 1.0:
            conf_buckets[10] += 1
        else:
            bucket = int\(c * 10\)
            conf_buckets[bucket] += 1

    print\(f"  {'Range':<14s} {'Count':>8s} {'%':>7s}  Bar"\)
    print\(f"  {'--------------':<14s} {'--------':>8s} {'-------':>7s}  {'----------------------------------------'}"\)
    for b in range\(11\):
        if b < 10:
            lo = b / 10.0
            hi = \(b + 1\) / 10.0
            label = f"[{lo:.1f}, {hi:.1f}\)"
        else:
            label = "[1.0]"
        count = conf_buckets.get\(b, 0\)
        pct = 100.0 * count / len\(all_confidences\)
        bar = "#" * max\(1, int\(pct / 2\)\) if count > 0 else ""
        print\(f"  {label:<14s} {count:>8,d} {pct:>6.2f}%  {bar}"\)
else:
    print\("  No confidence values found."\)
print\(\)

# ============================================================
# 5. Log Timing Analysis
# ============================================================
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("LOG TIMING ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\(f"\\nReading: {LOGFILE}\\n"\)

llm_pattern = re.compile\(
    r"^\(\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}\) \\d{2}:\\d{2}:\\d{2},\\d+ - DEBUG - .*?LLM .*? \\[.*?\\] \([\\d.]+\)s \\| "
    r"prompt=\(\\d+\) chars, resp=\(\\d+\) chars, eval_tokens=\(\\d+\), \([\\d.]+\) tok/s"
\)

wall_times = []
eval_tokens_list = []
toks_list = []
prompt_chars = []
resp_chars = []
calls_by_date = defaultdict\(list\)
warning_count = 0
error_count = 0
retry_count = 0
timeout_count = 0

with open\(LOGFILE, "r", encoding="utf-8", errors="replace"\) as f:
    for line in f:
        if " - WARNING - " in line:
            warning_count += 1
            if "timeout" in line.lower\(\):
                timeout_count += 1
            if "retry" in line.lower\(\) or "retrying" in line.lower\(\):
                retry_count += 1
        if " - ERROR - " in line:
            error_count += 1
            if "timeout" in line.lower\(\):
                timeout_count += 1

        m = llm_pattern.match\(line\)
        if m:
            date_str = m.group\(1\)
            wt = float\(m.group\(2\)\)
            pc = int\(m.group\(3\)\)
            rc = int\(m.group\(4\)\)
            et = int\(m.group\(5\)\)
            ts = float\(m.group\(6\)\)

            wall_times.append\(wt\)
            eval_tokens_list.append\(et\)
            toks_list.append\(ts\)
            prompt_chars.append\(pc\)
            resp_chars.append\(rc\)
            calls_by_date[date_str].append\(\(wt, ts, et\)\)

print\("-" * 60\)
print\("TABLE 5: Log Timing Analysis"\)
print\("-" * 60\)

total_llm_calls = len\(wall_times\)
total_wall = sum\(wall_times\)
total_eval_tokens = sum\(eval_tokens_list\)

print\(f"  {'Total LLM calls':<40s} {total_llm_calls:>12,d}"\)
print\(f"  {'Total wall-clock time \(seconds\)':<40s} {total_wall:>12,.1f}"\)
print\(f"  {'Total wall-clock time \(hours\)':<40s} {total_wall/3600:>12,.2f}"\)
print\(f"  {'Total eval tokens':<40s} {total_eval_tokens:>12,d}"\)
print\(\)

if wall_times:
    print\(f"  {'Avg wall time per call \(s\)':<40s} {mean\(wall_times\):>12.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Median wall time per call \(s\)':<40s} {median\(wall_times\):>12.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Min wall time per call \(s\)':<40s} {min\(wall_times\):>12.2f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Max wall time per call \(s\)':<40s} {max\(wall_times\):>12.2f}"\)
    print\(\)
    print\(f"  {'Avg tok/s':<40s} {mean\(toks_list\):>12.1f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Median tok/s':<40s} {median\(toks_list\):>12.1f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Min tok/s':<40s} {min\(toks_list\):>12.1f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Max tok/s':<40s} {max\(toks_list\):>12.1f}"\)
    print\(\)
    print\(f"  {'Avg prompt chars':<40s} {mean\(prompt_chars\):>12.0f}"\)
    print\(f"  {'Avg response chars':<40s} {mean\(resp_chars\):>12.0f}"\)
    print\(\)

print\(f"  {'WARNING lines in log':<40s} {warning_count:>12,d}"\)
print\(f"  {'ERROR lines in log':<40s} {error_count:>12,d}"\)
print\(f"  {'Timeout-related lines':<40s} {timeout_count:>12,d}"\)
print\(f"  {'Retry-related lines':<40s} {retry_count:>12,d}"\)
print\(\)

# Breakdown by date
if calls_by_date:
    print\("  Breakdown by date:"\)
    print\(f"  {'Date':<14s} {'Calls':>8s} {'Tot hrs':>8s} {'Avg wt\(s\)':>10s} {'Med wt\(s\)':>10s} {'Avg tok/s':>10s} {'Med tok/s':>10s}"\)
    print\(f"  {'--------------':<14s} {'--------':>8s} {'--------':>8s} {'----------':>10s} {'----------':>10s} {'----------':>10s} {'----------':>10s}"\)
    for date in sorted\(calls_by_date.keys\(\)\):
        entries = calls_by_date[date]
        wts = [e[0] for e in entries]
        tss = [e[1] for e in entries]
        n = len\(entries\)
        tot_h = sum\(wts\) / 3600
        print\(f"  {date:<14s} {n:>8,d} {tot_h:>8.2f} {mean\(wts\):>10.2f} {median\(wts\):>10.2f} {mean\(tss\):>10.1f} {median\(tss\):>10.1f}"\)
print\(\)

# ============================================================
# 6. Stage 2 Progress
# ============================================================
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("STAGE 2 PROGRESS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\(f"\\nReading: {STAGE2}\\n"\)

total_lines_s2 = 0
first_lines = []
last_lines = []
all_fields = set\(\)
s2_records = 0
s2_header = None
s2_footer = None

with open\(STAGE2, "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    for i, line in enumerate\(f\):
        total_lines_s2 += 1
        line = line.strip\(\)
        if not line:
            continue
        if i < 5:
            first_lines.append\(line\)
        last_lines.append\(line\)
        if len\(last_lines\) > 5:
            last_lines.pop\(0\)

        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line\)
            fields = set\(rec.keys\(\)\)
            all_fields.update\(fields\)

            if i == 0 and "job_index" not in rec:
                s2_header = rec
                continue
            if \("completed" in rec and "job_index" not in rec\) or \("total_records" in rec and "job_index" not in rec\):
                s2_footer = rec
                continue
            s2_records += 1
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            pass

print\(f"  Total lines in file:   {total_lines_s2:,d}"\)
print\(f"  Data records:          {s2_records:,d}"\)
print\(f"  Fields found:          {sorted\(all_fields\)}"\)
print\(\)

if s2_header:
    print\(f"  Header: {json.dumps\(s2_header, default=str\)[:300]}"\)
if s2_footer:
    print\(f"  Footer: {json.dumps\(s2_footer, default=str\)[:300]}"\)
print\(\)

print\("  First 3 lines \(truncated\):"\)
for i, ln in enumerate\(first_lines[:3]\):
    print\(f"    [{i}] {ln[:250]}..."\)
print\(\)
print\("  Last 3 lines \(truncated\):"\)
for i, ln in enumerate\(last_lines[-3:]\):
    print\(f"    [{i}] {ln[:250]}..."\)
print\(\)

# Re-read stage2 for field stats
print\("  Analyzing stage 2 record fields..."\)
s2_sample_fields = Counter\(\)
s2_verdict_counter = Counter\(\)
s2_count = 0

with open\(STAGE2, "r", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    for i, line in enumerate\(f\):
        line = line.strip\(\)
        if not line:
            continue
        try:
            rec = json.loads\(line\)
        except json.JSONDecodeError:
            continue

        if i == 0 and "job_index" not in rec:
            continue
        if \("completed" in rec and "job_index" not in rec\):
            continue

        s2_count += 1
        for k in rec.keys\(\):
            s2_sample_fields[k] += 1

        # Look for verdict/verification fields
        for vf in ["verdict", "verification_result", "verified", "is_valid", "keep", "status", "label", "is_skill"]:
            if vf in rec:
                s2_verdict_counter[f"{vf}={rec[vf]}"] += 1

print\(f"\\n  Stage 2 record count: {s2_count:,d}"\)
print\(f"\\n  Field frequency across all records:"\)
for field, cnt in s2_sample_fields.most_common\(\):
    pct = 100 * cnt / s2_count if s2_count else 0
    print\(f"    {field:<40s} {cnt:>8,d} \({pct:.1f}%\)"\)

if s2_verdict_counter:
    print\(f"\\n  Verdict/status distribution:"\)
    for label, cnt in s2_verdict_counter.most_common\(20\):
        pct = 100 * cnt / s2_count if s2_count else 0
        print\(f"    {label:<40s} {cnt:>8,d} \({pct:.1f}%\)"\)

print\(\)
print\("=" * 80\)
print\("ANALYSIS COMPLETE"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
PYEOF)

Bash(D:/PhD/skills-extraction/compare_runs.py << 'PYEOF'
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Compare Ollama vs vLLM stage1 extraction runs."""

import json
import statistics
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

print\("=" * 80\)
print\("LOADING DATA..."\)
print\("=" * 80\)

# Load Ollama stage1 checkpoint
ollama_data = {}
ollama_skills = []
ollama_mentions_by_job = {}

with open\('D:/PhD/skills-extraction/full_run_output/checkpoints/full_10k_20260327_185602_stage1_extracted.jsonl', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    for i, line in enumerate\(f\):
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
        if obj.get\('_meta'\):
            continue
        if '_footer' in obj:
            continue
        jk = obj['job_key']
        mentions = obj.get\('raw_mentions', []\)
        ollama_data[jk] = len\(mentions\)
        job_skills = []
        for m in mentions:
            nc = m.get\('normalized_candidate', m.get\('skill_span', ''\)\).lower\(\).strip\(\)
            if nc:
                ollama_skills.append\(nc\)
                job_skills.append\(nc\)
        ollama_mentions_by_job[jk] = job_skills

print\(f"Ollama: {len\(ollama_data\)} jobs loaded, {sum\(ollama_data.values\(\)\)} total mentions"\)

# Load vLLM augmented JSON
vllm_data = {}
vllm_skills = []
vllm_mentions_by_job = {}

with open\('D:/PhD/titan3/SkillsExtraction_augmented_run_20260402_214027.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    data = json.load\(f\)

for job in data:
    jk = job['extraction_metadata']['job_key']
    mentions = job.get\('skill_mentions', []\)
    vllm_data[jk] = len\(mentions\)
    job_skills = []
    for m in mentions:
        nc = m.get\('normalized_candidate', m.get\('skill_span', ''\)\).lower\(\).strip\(\)
        if nc:
            vllm_skills.append\(nc\)
            job_skills.append\(nc\)
    vllm_mentions_by_job[jk] = job_skills

del data

print\(f"vLLM:   {len\(vllm_data\)} jobs loaded, {sum\(vllm_data.values\(\)\)} total mentions"\)

all_keys = set\(ollama_data.keys\(\)\) | set\(vllm_data.keys\(\)\)
only_ollama_keys = set\(ollama_data.keys\(\)\) - set\(vllm_data.keys\(\)\)
only_vllm_keys = set\(vllm_data.keys\(\)\) - set\(ollama_data.keys\(\)\)
common_keys = set\(ollama_data.keys\(\)\) & set\(vllm_data.keys\(\)\)

print\(f"\\nJob keys: {len\(all_keys\)} total, {len\(common_keys\)} in both, "
      f"{len\(only_ollama_keys\)} only-Ollama, {len\(only_vllm_keys\)} only-vLLM"\)

# ===== 1. HIGH-LEVEL COMPARISON TABLE =====
print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("1. HIGH-LEVEL COMPARISON TABLE"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

def calc_stats\(data_dict\):
    counts = sorted\(data_dict.values\(\)\)
    total = sum\(counts\)
    avg = statistics.mean\(counts\)
    med = statistics.median\(counts\)
    mn = min\(counts\)
    mx = max\(counts\)
    zeros = sum\(1 for c in counts if c == 0\)
    std = statistics.stdev\(counts\)
    p25 = counts[len\(counts\)//4]
    p75 = counts[3*len\(counts\)//4]
    return total, avg, med, mn, mx, zeros, std, p25, p75

o_total, o_avg, o_med, o_min, o_max, o_zeros, o_std, o_p25, o_p75 = calc_stats\(ollama_data\)
v_total, v_avg, v_med, v_min, v_max, v_zeros, v_std, v_p25, v_p75 = calc_stats\(vllm_data\)

o_unique = len\(set\(ollama_skills\)\)
v_unique = len\(set\(vllm_skills\)\)

header = f"{'Metric':<30} {'Ollama \(qwen3:14b\)':>22} {'vLLM \(Qwen3-14B\)':>22} {'Difference':>15}"
print\(header\)
print\("-" * len\(header\)\)
rows = [
    \("Total jobs",            str\(len\(ollama_data\)\),  str\(len\(vllm_data\)\),    str\(len\(vllm_data\)-len\(ollama_data\)\)\),
    \("Total mentions",        str\(o_total\),           str\(v_total\),           f"{v_total - o_total:+d}"\),
    \("Avg mentions/job",      f"{o_avg:.2f}",         f"{v_avg:.2f}",         f"{v_avg-o_avg:+.2f}"\),
    \("Stdev mentions/job",    f"{o_std:.2f}",         f"{v_std:.2f}",         f"{v_std-o_std:+.2f}"\),
    \("Median mentions/job",   f"{o_med:.1f}",         f"{v_med:.1f}",         f"{v_med-o_med:+.1f}"\),
    \("25th pctile",           str\(o_p25\),             str\(v_p25\),             str\(v_p25 - o_p25\)\),
    \("75th pctile",           str\(o_p75\),             str\(v_p75\),             str\(v_p75 - o_p75\)\),
    \("Min mentions/job",      str\(o_min\),             str\(v_min\),             str\(v_min - o_min\)\),
    \("Max mentions/job",      str\(o_max\),             str\(v_max\),             str\(v_max - o_max\)\),
    \("Jobs with 0 mentions",  str\(o_zeros\),           str\(v_zeros\),           f"{v_zeros - o_zeros:+d}"\),
    \("Unique skill strings",  str\(o_unique\),          str\(v_unique\),          f"{v_unique - o_unique:+d}"\),
]
for label, oval, vval, diff in rows:
    print\(f"{label:<30} {oval:>22} {vval:>22} {diff:>15}"\)

# ===== 2. PER-JOB DIFFERENCE ANALYSIS =====
print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("2. PER-JOB DIFFERENCE ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

exact_match = 0
vllm_more = 0
ollama_more = 0
diffs = []

for jk in common_keys:
    oc = ollama_data[jk]
    vc = vllm_data[jk]
    d = vc - oc
    diffs.append\(\(jk, oc, vc, abs\(d\), d\)\)
    if d == 0:
        exact_match += 1
    elif d > 0:
        vllm_more += 1
    else:
        ollama_more += 1

print\(f"\\nAmong {len\(common_keys\)} common jobs:"\)
print\(f"  Exact count match:        {exact_match:>6} \({100*exact_match/len\(common_keys\):.1f}%\)"\)
print\(f"  vLLM has more mentions:   {vllm_more:>6} \({100*vllm_more/len\(common_keys\):.1f}%\)"\)
print\(f"  Ollama has more mentions: {ollama_more:>6} \({100*ollama_more/len\(common_keys\):.1f}%\)"\)

signed_diffs = [d[4] for d in diffs]
print\(f"\\n  Signed diff \(vLLM - Ollama\) stats:"\)
print\(f"    Mean:   {statistics.mean\(signed_diffs\):+.2f}"\)
print\(f"    Median: {statistics.median\(signed_diffs\):+.1f}"\)
print\(f"    Stdev:  {statistics.stdev\(signed_diffs\):.2f}"\)

diff_buckets = Counter\(\)
for d in signed_diffs:
    if d == 0:
        diff_buckets["     0"] += 1
    elif 1 <= d <= 5:
        diff_buckets["  +1 to  +5"] += 1
    elif 6 <= d <= 10:
        diff_buckets["  +6 to +10"] += 1
    elif 11 <= d <= 20:
        diff_buckets[" +11 to +20"] += 1
    elif 21 <= d <= 50:
        diff_buckets[" +21 to +50"] += 1
    elif d > 50:
        diff_buckets[" +51 or more"] += 1
    elif -5 <= d <= -1:
        diff_buckets["  -5 to  -1"] += 1
    elif -10 <= d <= -6:
        diff_buckets[" -10 to  -6"] += 1
    elif -20 <= d <= -11:
        diff_buckets[" -20 to -11"] += 1
    elif -50 <= d <= -21:
        diff_buckets[" -50 to -21"] += 1
    else:
        diff_buckets["-51 or less"] += 1

print\(f"\\n  Distribution of per-job difference \(vLLM - Ollama\):"\)
bucket_order = ["-51 or less", " -50 to -21", " -20 to -11", " -10 to  -6", "  -5 to  -1",
                "     0",
                "  +1 to  +5", "  +6 to +10", " +11 to +20", " +21 to +50", " +51 or more"]
for bucket in bucket_order:
    count = diff_buckets.get\(bucket, 0\)
    bar = "#" * \(count // 20\)
    print\(f"    {bucket}: {count:>5}  {bar}"\)

diffs_sorted = sorted\(diffs, key=lambda x: x[3], reverse=True\)
print\(f"\\n  Top 20 jobs with largest absolute difference:"\)
print\(f"  {'Job Key':<12} {'Ollama':>8} {'vLLM':>8} {'Diff \(v-o\)':>12}"\)
print\(f"  {'-'*12} {'-'*8} {'-'*8} {'-'*12}"\)
for jk, oc, vc, absd, sd in diffs_sorted[:20]:
    print\(f"  {jk:<12} {oc:>8} {vc:>8} {sd:>+12}"\)

# ===== 3. ZERO-MENTION ANALYSIS =====
print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("3. ZERO-MENTION ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

zero_ollama_nonzero_vllm = [\(jk, ollama_data[jk], vllm_data[jk]\) for jk in common_keys if ollama_data[jk] == 0 and vllm_data[jk] > 0]
zero_vllm_nonzero_ollama = [\(jk, ollama_data[jk], vllm_data[jk]\) for jk in common_keys if vllm_data[jk] == 0 and ollama_data[jk] > 0]
zero_both = [\(jk, ollama_data[jk], vllm_data[jk]\) for jk in common_keys if ollama_data[jk] == 0 and vllm_data[jk] == 0]

print\(f"\\n  Zero in BOTH runs:                     {len\(zero_both\):>5}"\)
print\(f"  Zero in Ollama but >0 in vLLM:         {len\(zero_ollama_nonzero_vllm\):>5}"\)
print\(f"  Zero in vLLM but >0 in Ollama:         {len\(zero_vllm_nonzero_ollama\):>5}"\)

if zero_ollama_nonzero_vllm:
    print\(f"\\n  Jobs with 0 Ollama mentions but >0 vLLM mentions \({len\(zero_ollama_nonzero_vllm\)} jobs, showing top 30\):"\)
    print\(f"  {'Job Key':<12} {'Ollama':>8} {'vLLM':>8}"\)
    print\(f"  {'-'*12} {'-'*8} {'-'*8}"\)
    for jk, oc, vc in sorted\(zero_ollama_nonzero_vllm, key=lambda x: -x[2]\)[:30]:
        print\(f"  {jk:<12} {oc:>8} {vc:>8}"\)

if zero_vllm_nonzero_ollama:
    print\(f"\\n  Jobs with 0 vLLM mentions but >0 Ollama mentions \({len\(zero_vllm_nonzero_ollama\)} jobs, showing top 30\):"\)
    print\(f"  {'Job Key':<12} {'Ollama':>8} {'vLLM':>8}"\)
    print\(f"  {'-'*12} {'-'*8} {'-'*8}"\)
    for jk, oc, vc in sorted\(zero_vllm_nonzero_ollama, key=lambda x: -x[1]\)[:30]:
        print\(f"  {jk:<12} {oc:>8} {vc:>8}"\)

# ===== 4. SKILL OVERLAP \(Top 100\) =====
print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("4. SKILL OVERLAP ANALYSIS \(Top 100 skills by frequency\)"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

ollama_counter = Counter\(ollama_skills\)
vllm_counter = Counter\(vllm_skills\)

ollama_top100 = set\(s for s, _ in ollama_counter.most_common\(100\)\)
vllm_top100 = set\(s for s, _ in vllm_counter.most_common\(100\)\)

both_top100 = ollama_top100 & vllm_top100
only_ollama_top100 = ollama_top100 - vllm_top100
only_vllm_top100 = vllm_top100 - ollama_top100

print\(f"\\n  In BOTH top-100:         {len\(both_top100\)}"\)
print\(f"  Only in Ollama top-100:  {len\(only_ollama_top100\)}"\)
print\(f"  Only in vLLM top-100:    {len\(only_vllm_top100\)}"\)

print\(f"\\n  Top 30 shared skills \(in both top-100, sorted by combined frequency\):"\)
print\(f"  {'Rank':>4} {'Skill':<40} {'Ollama':>8} {'vLLM':>8} {'Ratio v/o':>10}"\)
print\(f"  {'-'*4} {'-'*40} {'-'*8} {'-'*8} {'-'*10}"\)
shared_sorted = sorted\(both_top100, key=lambda s: -\(ollama_counter[s] + vllm_counter[s]\)\)
for rank, s in enumerate\(shared_sorted[:30], 1\):
    oc = ollama_counter[s]
    vc = vllm_counter[s]
    ratio = vc / oc if oc > 0 else float\('inf'\)
    print\(f"  {rank:>4} {s:<40} {oc:>8} {vc:>8} {ratio:>10.2f}"\)

if only_ollama_top100:
    print\(f"\\n  Skills ONLY in Ollama top-100 \(not in vLLM top-100\):"\)
    print\(f"  {'Skill':<40} {'Ollama freq':>12} {'vLLM freq':>12} {'vLLM rank':>10}"\)
    print\(f"  {'-'*40} {'-'*12} {'-'*12} {'-'*10}"\)
    vllm_rank_map = {s: r for r, \(s, _\) in enumerate\(vllm_counter.most_common\(\), 1\)}
    for s in sorted\(only_ollama_top100, key=lambda x: -ollama_counter[x]\):
        vr = vllm_rank_map.get\(s, 'N/A'\)
        print\(f"  {s:<40} {ollama_counter[s]:>12} {vllm_counter.get\(s, 0\):>12} {str\(vr\):>10}"\)

if only_vllm_top100:
    print\(f"\\n  Skills ONLY in vLLM top-100 \(not in Ollama top-100\):"\)
    print\(f"  {'Skill':<40} {'vLLM freq':>12} {'Ollama freq':>12} {'Ollama rank':>10}"\)
    print\(f"  {'-'*40} {'-'*12} {'-'*12} {'-'*10}"\)
    ollama_rank_map = {s: r for r, \(s, _\) in enumerate\(ollama_counter.most_common\(\), 1\)}
    for s in sorted\(only_vllm_top100, key=lambda x: -vllm_counter[x]\):
        orr = ollama_rank_map.get\(s, 'N/A'\)
        print\(f"  {s:<40} {vllm_counter[s]:>12} {ollama_counter.get\(s, 0\):>12} {str\(orr\):>10}"\)

# ===== 5. TIMEOUT CORRELATION =====
print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("5. vLLM TIMEOUT / FAILED BATCH ANALYSIS"\)
print\("=" * 80\)

failed_batches = [655, 798, 1077, 1612, 2028, 2710, 3295, 7290, 8053, 8364, 8592, 9184, 18698]
print\(f"\\n  Failed batch numbers \(13 total\): {failed_batches}"\)

try:
    with open\('D:/PhD/titan3/SkillsExtraction_run_summary_20260402_214027.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        summary = json.load\(f\)
    
    print\(f"\\n  vLLM Run Summary excerpts:"\)
    for k in ['total_jobs', 'total_mentions', 'total_unique_skills', 'total_zero_mention_jobs',
              'total_candidates', 'pipeline_version']:
        if k in summary:
            print\(f"    {k}: {summary[k]}"\)
    
    if 'stage_timing' in summary:
        print\(f"\\n  Stage timing:"\)
        for stage, timing in summary['stage_timing'].items\(\):
            if isinstance\(timing, dict\):
                dur = timing.get\('duration_seconds', timing.get\('duration', 'N/A'\)\)
                print\(f"    {stage}: {dur}"\)
            else:
                print\(f"    {stage}: {timing}"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"  Could not load run summary: {e}"\)

print\(f"\\n  --- Potential Timeout Impact Analysis ---"\)

vllm_deficit_jobs = [\(jk, ollama_data[jk], vllm_data[jk], ollama_data[jk] - vllm_data[jk]\) 
                     for jk in common_keys 
                     if ollama_data[jk] > vllm_data[jk] and \(ollama_data[jk] - vllm_data[jk]\) >= 5]
vllm_deficit_jobs.sort\(key=lambda x: -x[3]\)

print\(f"\\n  Jobs where Ollama has >=5 more mentions than vLLM: {len\(vllm_deficit_jobs\)}"\)
print\(f"  Total missing vLLM mentions in these jobs: {sum\(x[3] for x in vllm_deficit_jobs\)}"\)

ollama_deficit_jobs = [\(jk, ollama_data[jk], vllm_data[jk], vllm_data[jk] - ollama_data[jk]\) 
                       for jk in common_keys 
                       if vllm_data[jk] > ollama_data[jk] and \(vllm_data[jk] - ollama_data[jk]\) >= 5]
ollama_deficit_jobs.sort\(key=lambda x: -x[3]\)

print\(f"  Jobs where vLLM has >=5 more mentions than Ollama: {len\(ollama_deficit_jobs\)}"\)
print\(f"  Total extra vLLM mentions in these jobs: {sum\(x[3] for x in ollama_deficit_jobs\)}"\)

if vllm_deficit_jobs:
    print\(f"\\n  Top 20 jobs with most missing vLLM mentions \(possible timeout impact\):"\)
    print\(f"  {'Job Key':<12} {'Ollama':>8} {'vLLM':>8} {'Deficit':>10}"\)
    print\(f"  {'-'*12} {'-'*8} {'-'*8} {'-'*10}"\)
    for jk, oc, vc, d in vllm_deficit_jobs[:20]:
        print\(f"  {jk:<12} {oc:>8} {vc:>8} {d:>10}"\)

total_vllm_deficit = sum\(max\(0, ollama_data[jk] - vllm_data[jk]\) for jk in common_keys\)
total_ollama_deficit = sum\(max\(0, vllm_data[jk] - ollama_data[jk]\) for jk in common_keys\)

print\(f"\\n  Summary of timeout/difference impact:"\)
print\(f"    13 failed batches in vLLM run"\)
print\(f"    {len\(zero_vllm_nonzero_ollama\)} jobs have 0 vLLM mentions but >0 Ollama mentions"\)
print\(f"    {len\(zero_ollama_nonzero_vllm\)} jobs have 0 Ollama mentions but >0 vLLM mentions"\)
print\(f"    Total mentions where Ollama > vLLM \(summed deficits\): {total_vllm_deficit}"\)
print\(f"    Total mentions where vLLM > Ollama \(summed surplus\):  {total_ollama_deficit}"\)
net = sum\(vllm_data.values\(\)\) - sum\(ollama_data.values\(\)\)
print\(f"    Net difference \(vLLM total - Ollama total\):           {net:+d}"\)
o_sum = sum\(ollama_data.values\(\)\)
print\(f"    Percentage increase vLLM over Ollama:                 {100*net/o_sum:+.1f}%"\)

print\(f"\\n  --- Ollama Fallback Impact ---"\)
print\(f"    Ollama log shows batch failures \(503 errors, DNS failures\)"\)
print\(f"    These used fallback mechanism \(likely OpenRouter\)"\)
print\(f"    Unlike vLLM where failed batches produce 0 mentions,"\)
print\(f"    Ollama fallback likely still produced results."\)

print\("\\n" + "=" * 80\)
print\("ANALYSIS COMPLETE"\)
print\("=" * 80\)
